parameters.query: INSERT INTO "SIMAPO".stock_opname (id, nomoropname, tanggal, status, createdat, updatedat, instansi_id, createdbyid) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'OPN-' + TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), NOW(), 'SELESAI', NOW(), NOW(), '{{ ($json.body.instansi_id || $json.query.instansi_id || "bapperida").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.headers["x-nip"] || $json.body.nip || "ADMIN").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}') RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO "SIMAPO".detail_opname (id, opnameid, barangid, stoksistem, stokfisik, selisih, instansi_id) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), '{{ ($json.opnameid).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.barangid).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ ($json.stoksistem).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}, {{ ($json.stokfisik).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}, {{ ($json.selisih).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}, '{{ ($json.instansi_id || "bapperida").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'); UPDATE "SIMAPO".barang SET stok_saat_ini = {{ ($json.stokfisik).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}, updatedat = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ ($json.barangid).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}';

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'Stok opname berhasil disimpan' } }];
